title: Program Associate
description:
Morgan Stanley is a leading global financial services firm serving institutional and individual clients worldwide.

We're seeking a Program Associate to join our Investment Banking team in Madison. This role offers the opportunity to contribute meaningfully to our mission while developing your professional skills in a collaborative environment.
responsibilities: Perform primary duties related to program associate
Collaborate with team members to achieve goals
Maintain high quality standards in all work
Ensure compliance with relevant policies and procedures

requirements.education: High school diploma or equivalent; relevant degree preferred
